channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: Iran-US talks over Tehran's nuclear program hinge on a billionaire and a seasoned diplomat
item.description: As far as biographies go, the two men in charge of the delicate negotiations between Iran and the United States over Tehran’s rapidly advancing nuclear program couldn’t be more different.
item.dc:creator: Jon Gambrell And Amir Vahdat, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US man hijacks small plane in Belize, stabs 3 people before he's shot dead
item.description: Authorities at the Philip S.W. Goldson International Airport reported a hijacking of a small plan by a U.S. man who stabbed two passengers and a pilot before being fatally shot.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China’s leader concludes visit to Cambodia at the end of a 3-nation Southeast Asia tour
item.description: PHNOM PENH, Cambodia (AP) — Chinese President Xi Jinping on Friday completed a two-day state visit to Cambodia, capping a three-nation tour that included stops in Vietnam and Malaysia at a time when all three Southeast Asian countries are facing economic challenges from U.S.
item.dc:creator: SOPHENG CHEANG and GRANT PECK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Protest letters from former Israeli soldiers lay bare profound rifts over the ongoing war
item.description: When nearly 1,000 Israeli Air Force veterans signed an open letter last week calling for an end to the war in Gaza, the military responded immediately, saying it would dismiss any active reservist who signed the document.
item.dc:creator: Melanie Lidman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The US has a single rare earths mine. Chinese export limits are energizing a push for more
item.description: America’s only rare earths mine has fielded calls from anxious companies since China responded to President Donald Trump's tariffs by limiting exports of seven heavy metals.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US lawmakers' bipartisan Taiwan visit signals support despite harsh words and tariffs from Trump
item.description: Republican and Democratic lawmakers are making their first trip to Taiwan under the new Trump administration a bipartisan one.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Bodeen, Ellen Knickmeyer And Simina Mistreanu, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Carney says lower internal trade barriers will help Canada more than Trump's tariffs will harm it
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday eliminating trade barriers within Canada would benefit Canadians far more than U.S. President Donald Trump can ever take away with his trade war as he made his case to retain power at the last debate ahead of the April 28 vote.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: UN nuclear watchdog says US-Iran talks at a 'very crucial' stage
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Talks between Iran and the United States over Tehran's rapidly advancing nuclear program are “in a very crucial” stage, the head of the United Nations' nuclear watchdog said Thursday while on a visit to the Islamic Republic.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL and AMIR VAHDAT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Thousands of Gaza children are malnourished under Israel's food blockade, aid groups say
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — Aid groups are raising new alarm over Israel’s blockade of the war-ravaged Gaza Strip, where it has barred entry of all food and other goods for more than six weeks.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA, FATMA KHALED and LEE KEATH, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cable car accident in southern Italy kills at least 4 people
item.description: MILAN (AP) — A cable car carrying tourists south of Naples crashed to the ground Thursday after a cable snapped, killing at least four people and critically injuring one, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Van Hollen blocked from visiting mistakenly deported man in El Salvador
item.description: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.) said he and a lawyer for the family of Kilmar Abrego Garcia were stopped at a security checkpoint in El Salvador on Thursday when they tried to visit the mistakenly deported man at CECOT prison.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, The Hill

item.title: Pope Francis visits Rome prison during Holy Week
item.description: Pope Francis kept annual Holy Week appointment visiting dozens of inmates in a Rome prison on Thursday. The 88-year-old is still recovering from pneumonia.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ICC opens inquiry into Hungary for failing to arrest Netanyahu
item.description: THE HAGUE, Netherlands (AP) — Judges at the International Criminal Court want Hungary to explain why it failed to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu when he visited Budapest earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: MOLLY QUELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former MLS player Aaron Boupendza dies after falling from building, soccer officials say
item.description: The Gabonese soccer federation announced Wednesday that Aaron Boupendza, a striker for its men's national team, has died after falling from the 11th floor of a building in China.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former MLS player Aaron Boupendza dies after falling from building in China, soccer officials say
item.description: The Gabonese soccer federation announced Wednesday that Aaron Boupendza, a striker for its men's national team, has died after falling from the 11th floor of a building in China.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man gets life in prison in killing of transgender model in the South Caucasus nation of Georgia
item.description: TBILISI, Georgia (AP) — A man was convicted Wednesday of stabbing to death a transgender actor and model in her apartment in Georgia last year, a killing that shocked the South Caucasus nation and came a day after lawmakers passed legislation that severely restricted LGBTQ+ rights.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Father of American-Israeli hostage pushes for ceasefire
item.description: Adi Alexander shares a message for his son, urging him to stay strong and assuring him the family won’t stop fighting for his return.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: Hamas says it's sending a delegation to Qatar to continue Gaza ceasefire talks
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — A Hamas official said Monday that the Palestinian militant group is sending a delegation to the Gulf state of Qatar to continue indirect ceasefire talks with Israel over the war in Gaza, as the territory’s Health Ministry said that 38 people were confirmed dead over
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Russia claims its deadly attack on Ukraine's Sumy targeted military forces as condemnation grows
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — Russia on Monday claimed its deadly missile attack on Ukraine's Sumy that killed and wounded scores including children had targeted a gathering of Ukrainian troops, while European leaders condemned the attack as a war crime.
item.dc:creator: LORNE COOK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: El Salvador's Bukele says he won’t return Abrego Garcia to US
item.description: President Nayib Bukele called Abrego Garcia “a terrorist” and said he had no power to return Abrego Garcia to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: Trump blames Zelensky for Ukraine war after '60 Minutes' interview
item.description: President Trump on Monday sought to distance himself from the war between Russia and Ukraine as his promise to end the conflict quickly has proven difficult to accomplish. "The War between Russia and Ukraine is Biden’s war, not mine.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: Israel intensifies strikes across Gaza on Palm Sunday and hits a hospital in the north
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza (AP) — A wave of Israeli strikes across Gaza on Sunday hit a hospital, a municipal building, a home and a vehicle, killing at least 21 people, including children, as Israel vowed to expand its security presence in the small coastal strip.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tragic NYC helicopter crash hits home in Barcelona, where victims were well known
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — As they sat inside a helicopter shortly before a flight over the towering skyscrapers of New York City, Agustin Escobar flashed a thumbs-up while his wife and children beamed big smiles.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Universal announces UK theme park amid 'epic' growth of parks business
item.description: Universal Destinations & Experiences is expanding its global theme park footprint, confirming a new theme park will be built in the U.K. -- the latest in a trio of ambitious projects for the company.
item.dc:creator: Scott Gustin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump admin ordered to return alleged MS-13 member mistakenly deported
item.description: The justices did not say exactly what Kilmar Abrego Garcia's release would entail or how he would return to the United States.
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation
